result.stdout:
USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    build       Builds the project                                              
    init        Initialize a new project                                        
    run         Run a BunnyBox project                                          
    version     Show the version of the BunnyBox CLI                            
    divorce     Removes BunnyBox dependencies from the project and leaves the   
                underlying framework alone                                      
    packages                                                                    
    sdks

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    build       Builds the project                                              
    init        Initialize a new project                                        
    run         Run a BunnyBox project                                          
    version     Show the version of the BunnyBox CLI                            
    divorce     Removes BunnyBox dependencies from the project and leaves the   
                underlying framework alone                                      
    packages                                                                    
    sdks

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Builds the project

USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI build [path] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [path]     

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help               Prints help information
    -v, --verbose                                   
    -o, --output <OUTPUT>

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Removes BunnyBox dependencies from the project and leaves the underlying 
framework alone

USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI divorce [path] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [path]     

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information
    -v, --verbose

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Initialize a new project

USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI init [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                         Prints help information
    -v, --verbose                                             
    -s, --sdk <SDKNAME>                                       
    -t, --type <TYPE>                                         
    -n, --name <NAME>                                         
    -d, --description <DESCRIPTION>                           
    -a, --author <AUTHOR>                                     
        --version <VERSION>                                   
    -l, --license <LICENSE>                                   
    -o, --output <OUTPUT>                                     
    -f, --force <TRUE|FALSE>

commands.payload:

    -f, --force <TRUE|FALSE>

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI packages [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    pack       Pack a BunnyBox project                 
    publish    Publish a package to a remote repository

Publish a package to a remote repository

    BunnyBox CLI packages publish [path] [OPTIONS]

    [path]

    -v, --verbose                                               
    -r, --repository <REPOSITORY_URL>

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI sdks [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list       List all installed SDKs
    install    Install a BunnyBox SDK

commands.payload:

OPTIONS:

COMMANDS:
    list       List all installed SDKs
    install    Install a BunnyBox SDK

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Install a BunnyBox SDK

USAGE:
    BunnyBox CLI sdks install [sdk] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [sdk]     

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information
    -v, --version <VERSION>                           
    -f, --force
